content.text:
Contoso offers the "Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses," which fall under the Smart Eyewear category. Key features of this product include:

- Augmented Reality interface
- Voice-controlled AI agent
- HD video recording with 3D audio
- UV protection and blue light filtering
- Wireless charging with extended battery life

It comes with a two-year limited warranty on electronic components and a 30-day return policy with no questions asked.
